{{Missing Info}}

= Super Species Bowl =
[[File:Super Species Bowl Poster.png|200px|left|alt=(Event Name)]]
Jan. 24 - Feb. 06 2025

'''Official News Announcement:''' https://snail-na.qcplay.com/official/news-details.html?id=117
{{Clear}}

= Relic Rewards =
* {{ImageWithLink|?|orange}}
* {{ImageWithLink|?|green}}
* {{ImageWithLink|?|green}}

= Robot Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|?|orange|Robots}}

= Shell Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|?|purple}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|?|purple}}

[[Category:Events]]
